basic_details.job_title: ECHS Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Ex Servicemen Contributory Health Scheme (ECHS) Medical Officer Notification 2026 has been released on 20 May 2026 on the official website www.echs.gov.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the ECHS Medical Officer Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS with preferable additional qualifications in Medicine/Surgery and minimum 03 years work experience after internship
qualification.details: Medical Officer: MBBS with preferable additional qualifications in Medicine/Surgery and minimum 03 years work experience after internship.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ECHS Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.echs.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 30-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ECHS Medical Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the ECHS Medical Officer position is 30th June 2026. Candidates are strongly advised to submit their applications well in advance of this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Medical Officer post?
faq.answer: The required educational qualification for the Medical Officer post is an MBBS degree. Preference will be given to candidates with additional qualifications in Medicine or Surgery, along with a minimum of three years of work experience after completing their internship.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Medical Officer position?
faq.answer: Selected candidates for the Medical Officer post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 95,000 per month. This is a contractual position, and the salary is fixed for the duration of the contract.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the ECHS Medical Officer job?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is offline. You need to download the application form from the official ECHS website, fill it out carefully, attach the necessary documents, and send it to the address specified in the official notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this ECHS Medical Officer recruitment. Candidates can apply without paying any application charges.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the ECHS Medical Officer role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Medical Officer post will primarily involve an interview. Candidates who are shortlisted based on their applications will be called for an interview, followed by document verification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies for the Medical Officer post?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Medical Officer post announced in this recruitment drive by the Ex Servicemen Contributory Health Scheme (ECHS).

faq.question: Q8. Where is the ECHS Medical Officer job located?
faq.answer: The ECHS Medical Officer job is located in Jhakri, Himachal Pradesh, with the pincode 172201.

faq.question: Q9. What is the nature of the ECHS Medical Officer job?
faq.answer: The Medical Officer position is a contractual job. This means the appointment will be for a fixed tenure as per the terms and conditions mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and the application form can be downloaded from the official website of the Ex Servicemen Contributory Health Scheme (ECHS), which is www.echs.gov.in. Links are also provided in the Important Links section of this article.
